body:
- Deprecate and remove Balatro-style \`Run.js\` and \`Card.js\` models
- Add \`Match.js\` to record completed PvE skill poker matches
- Add \`MatchReplay.js\` for detailed hand-by-hand action history
- Add \`Achievement.js\` for static achievement definitions
- Update \`User.js\` stats structure to track \`totalGames\` and \`totalWins\`

Refs: req_pve.md section 8, api.md

comments.body:
> `tests/db/dbCheck.js` still imports `Run` from `../../src/models/Run.js`. Deleting `Run.js` will break this test file — either rewrite it with the new `Match` model or remove it.

I think `dbCheck.js` is a good db test entry for all db tests, so other db tests like `Match.js` just need to be placed on the folder and been called in `dbCheck.js`.

reviews.body: `tests/db/dbCheck.js` still imports `Run` from `../../src/models/Run.js`. Deleting `Run.js` will break this test file — either rewrite it with the new `Match` model or remove it.

title: refactor(models): align schema with PvE skill poker requirements
